name: 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets
about: 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets are an effective medication for controlling high blood sugar levels in patients with type 2 diabetes. These tablets come in a solid dosage form and are to be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. The tablets are manufactured in India and are of general medicine drug type. They are stored in a dry place to maintain their efficacy.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets?
faq.a: The recommended dosage for 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets should be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional.

faq.q: What is the physical form of 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets?
faq.a: 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets come in a solid dosage form.

faq.q: Can 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets be taken by patients with type 1 diabetes?
faq.a: No, 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets are not recommended for patients with type 1 diabetes.

faq.q: What is the origin of 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets?
faq.a: 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: What is the storage instruction for 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets?
faq.a: 80 MG Gliclazide Tablets should be stored in a dry place to maintain their efficacy.
